channel.title: Doğu's Personal Notes
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Doğu's Personal Notes

item.title: 📋 Project Planning System
item.description: Project Planning System Purpose: A comprehensive framework for planning ANY project from idea to execution 🚀 Quick Start For a New Project: Copy the Master Plan template Template: 00-Project-Master-Plan Fill in all 14 sections This is your single source of truth Create supporting documents as neede...

item.title: {{Project}} - Financial Plan
item.description: Financial Plan: {{Project}} Funding Requirements Capital Needed Total required: $ Use of funds: CategoryAmount%Product Development$%Marketing & Sales$%Operations$%Legal & Admin$%Contingency$%Total$100% Funding Timeline DateAmountSourceUse$$ Revenue Model Revenue Streams Stream 1: [Name] Desc...

item.title: {{Feature Name}} - Brief
item.description: Feature Brief: {{Feature Name}} Overview What [One sentence description] Why [Problem this solves] Who [Target users] Success Criteria [How we’ll know it’s successful] Problem Statement Current situation: Pain point: Impact: Proposed Solution What we’ll build: How it solves the problem: User experie...

item.title: {{Project}} - Go-to-Market Plan
item.description: Go-to-Market Plan: {{Project}} Executive Summary Launch Date: Target: users/customers in first 90 days Budget: $ Team: Target Market Primary Segment Who: Size: Characteristics: Secondary Segment Early Adopter Profile Who they are: Where to find them: Why they’ll try: Positioning Positioning Statemen...

item.title: {{Project}} - Technical Specification
item.description: Technical Specification: {{Project}} System Overview Architecture Diagram [Draw or describe system architecture] Key Components Tech Stack Frontend Web Application ComponentTechnologyWhyFrameworkState ManagementStylingBuild Tool Mobile Application PlatformTechnologyWhyiOSAndroidCross-platform Backen...

item.title: {{Project}} - Market Research
item.description: Market Research: {{Project}} Market Size TAM (Total Addressable Market) Definition: Everyone who could potentially use your product Size: $ billion / million users Sources: SAM (Serviceable Addressable Market) Definition: The segment you can actually reach Size: $ million / thousand users Sources: S...

item.title: {{Project Name}} - Master Plan
item.description: {{Project Name}} - Master Plan One-Liner: [One sentence describing what this is] 📋 Table of Contents Executive Summary Problem & Opportunity Solution & Vision Market Analysis Target Audience Features & Requirements Technical Architecture Business Model Marketing & Growth Roadmap &am...

item.title: Getting Started
item.description: How I Use This Vault My Workflow Capture - Quick notes, ideas, links Organize - Add tags, link related notes Build - npx quartz build Deploy - git push Share - Send link when needed This is my personal space for thinking and building.

item.title: Welcome
item.description: Doğu’s Personal Notes Welcome to my digital garden! 🌱 About This Space This is where I keep my: Personal notes Project ideas Learning journey Random thoughts Quick Links Getting Started - How I use this vault Last Updated: March 25, 2026.
